sections.label: Verse 1
lines: A seem dingte tawm lua a, na sep ding tampi om hi,
Topa buh lak hun zo ta hi.
Buhte minkhin kuai zota hi,
Tawntung khuamial gam sungah nisim in bei den,

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Aw, nisim nai simin bei den,
Ka itna bei thei tuanlo,
A mawkna in ka si luang ke’nteh,
Ka tatsate’n ahilh kei leh,
Vantung mi sawl mai ning.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Kuate ahiam, ka sawl ding, kei adingin kua pai nuam,
Ka si manpha tawh ka tatsa,
Mawhna sungah nisim bei den,
Ka kiangah hong tung thei ding kuamah omlo

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Amaute ka it manin, ka gam nuampi nusia in,
Singkhuam tungah kipia zo ingh.
Gimna thuak a ka tatna thu,
Mi tampi’n theilo in khuamial sung om den.

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Kei hiah om ingh Topa aw, nang ading hong sawl inla,
Ka nuntakna nang a hi khin,
Kha siangtho in hong makaih hen,
Ka sem den ding gam khempeuh na neih mateng
